title: spec_archive_pruned event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Historical event emitted by the tombstone-era `caws specs prune-archive --apply` command. The current prune-archive command is a compatibility no-op because archive bodies under .caws/specs/.archive/ are canonical again. This schema remains to validate existing event logs.

oneOf.$comment: Removed: the legacy archive body was recoverable from git history (a commit on the current branch contains the file at from_path), so it was deleted from the working tree. blob_sha is the recovery target; from_commit_sha names the commit that contained the body, for human audit.

from_commit_sha.description: Optional: the commit that contained the recovered body.

oneOf.$comment: Quarantined: the legacy archive body was NOT recoverable from git history (no commit contains it). The body was moved to .caws/specs/.archive/.unrecoverable/<id>.yaml so the operator can review and decide manually. NO blob_sha because there is none in git.

to_path.description: Destination under .archive/.unrecoverable/. Preserves the body for human inspection.
